sys_update_xml.name: catalog_script_client_15ed47a9837b72507e911530ceaad326
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>false</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>false</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>false</applies_target_record><applies_to>item</applies_to><cat_item display_value="Change of Ownership">fedbcee583ff32507e911530ceaad35a</cat_item><cat_variable>IO:7f0d8ee983ff32507e911530ceaad380</cat_variable><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Service Number Validation</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading) {
    if (isLoading || newValue == '') {
        return;
    }
    var ga = new GlideAjax('ValidateWithPhone');
    ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'check'); 
    ga.addParam('sysparm_phone', newValue);
    ga.getXMLAnswer(function(answer) {
		console.log("answer"+answer);
        if (answer) {
            g_form.setValue('recipient_name', answer);
            g_form.setReadOnly('recipient_name', true);
        } else {
            g_form.setValue('recipient_name', '');
            g_form.setReadOnly('recipient_name', false);
        }
    });
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-23 09:59:13</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>15ed47a9837b72507e911530ceaad326</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Service Number Validation</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_15ed47a9837b72507e911530ceaad326</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-23 10:17:01</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set/><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: catalog_script_client_498f86a1833372507e911530ceaad380
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="DELETE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>false</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>false</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>false</applies_target_record><applies_to>item</applies_to><cat_item display_value="Change of Ownership">fedbcee583ff32507e911530ceaad35a</cat_item><cat_variable/><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Validate Recipient Name</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onSubmit() {
   //Type appropriate comment here, and begin script below
    var name = g_form.getValue('recipient_name');

    var regex = /^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z\s'-]{4,}$/;

    if (!regex.test(name)) {
        alert("Invalid Name Format");
        return false;
    }

    if (name.includes("--") || name.includes("''") || name.includes("  ")) {
        alert("Invalid special character sequence");
        return false;
    }

    return true;
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-23 05:15:25</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>498f86a1833372507e911530ceaad380</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Validate Recipient Name</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_498f86a1833372507e911530ceaad380</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-23 05:15:25</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onSubmit</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set/><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: catalog_script_client_bfff66a1837772507e911530ceaad344
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>false</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>false</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>false</applies_target_record><applies_to>item</applies_to><cat_item display_value="Change of Ownership">fedbcee583ff32507e911530ceaad35a</cat_item><cat_variable>IO:f76dc6e583ff32507e911530ceaad364</cat_variable><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Validate Recipient Name</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading) {

    if (isLoading || newValue == '')
        return;

    var name = newValue;

    // Rule 1: Minimum length
    if (name.length < 5) {

        g_form.showFieldMsg(
            'recipient_name',
            'Name must be at least 5 characters.',
            'error'
        );

        g_form.clearValue('recipient_name');

        return;
    }

    // Rule 2: First character must be alphabet
    var firstChar = name.charAt(0);

    if (!/^[A-Za-z]$/.test(firstChar)) {

        g_form.showFieldMsg(
            'recipient_name',
            'First character must be a letter.',
            'error'
        );

        g_form.clearValue('recipient_name');

        return;
    }

    // Rule 3: Allowed characters only
    var validChars = /^[A-Za-z' -]+$/;

    if (!validChars.test(name)) {

        g_form.showFieldMsg(
            'recipient_name',
            'Only letters, space, apostrophe and hyphen are allowed.',
            'error'
        );

        g_form.clearValue('recipient_name');

        return;
    }

    // Rule 4: No sequential special characters
    if (/[' -]{2,}/.test(name)) {

        g_form.showFieldMsg(
            'recipient_name',
            'Space, apostrophe or hyphen cannot be consecutive.',
            'error'
        );

        g_form.clearValue('recipient_name');

        return;
    }

}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-23 07:49:55</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>bfff66a1837772507e911530ceaad344</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Validate Recipient Name</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_bfff66a1837772507e911530ceaad344</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-23 09:43:29</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>false</va_supported><variable_set/><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>
